{{Dialogue|Cilghal|Someone else has died?|Anakin Solo|Lusa. A pack of voxyn ran her down.|Tahiri Veila|We just heard over the subspace. She was at home, just running through a meadow.|Jaina Solo|She was supposed to be safe. Chiron is a long way from the Yuuzhan Vong.|attr=[[Cilghal]], [[Anakin Solo]], [[Tahiri Veila]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|src=<ref name="SbS">''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''</ref>}}
'''Chiron''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Chiron system/Legends|Chiron system]], in the large [[Sector/Legends|sector]] known as the [[Ash Worlds/Legends|Ash Worlds]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Chironian]]s.

One Chironian, [[Lusa]], joined [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[New Jedi Order]] and became a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Shortly before the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|conquest]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Lusa was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on Chiron by a [[voxyn]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Chironian race is described as [[centauriform]]s.
